summary: A wild sand‑storm‑charged Watchtower moment energizes the show; recording source and fidelity are not described.
review: Reviewers highlight an intense, almost cinematic sandstorm that kicked up during 'Watchtower', giving the performance a memorable visual backdrop. No specific comments about the audio mix or source type were provided, leaving the technical quality unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: One enthusiastic 5‑star review praises the vibe of the show while a second rating gives no feedback; lack of recording details keeps confidence low.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer mentioned soundboard, audience, or any audio clarity issues; only atmospheric observations were made.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Insufficient information to assess overall set pacing; only a single song moment is noted.
